Dessert Bar · Coffee · Late-night sweets
milki

the everything dessert bar

Warm churros and gooey brownie puddles, a build-your-own ice cream bar, towering konkrete shakes and a glowing counter of cakes, pies & cheesecakes — all under one softly-lit, neon-pink roof.

Explore the menu Plan a visit
Churros✦Konkrete Shakes✦Basque Cheesecake✦Build-Your-Own Ice Cream✦Affogato✦Brownie Puddle✦Signature Hot Chocolate✦ Churros✦Konkrete Shakes✦Basque Cheesecake✦Build-Your-Own Ice Cream✦Affogato✦Brownie Puddle✦Signature Hot Chocolate✦
The concept

A whole dessert world, spooned up in one sitting.

milki isn't a single dessert — it's a bar. Pull up to the counter and it unfolds in stations: From the Kitchen for warm, gooey plates; The Everything Bar of cakes, cheesecakes, pies and brownies by the slice; and the Ice Cream Bar, where you build your own scoop, pop or soft-serve with your pick of flavours, top-it-offs and drizzles.

Add konkrete shakes thick enough to stand a spoon in, affogatos, frappés and a signature marshmallow-fluff hot chocolate, and you have a place designed for lingering — gold spoons, Edison bulbs and burgundy tiles included.
